query:
INSERT INTO metric_events (
                        metric_id,
                        feature_key,
                        environment_id,
                        user_context,
                        variant,
                        value,
                        metadata,
                        is_conversion,
                        occurred_at
                    ) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
                    ON CONFLICT (metric_id, feature_key, environment_id, user_context, variant)
                        WHERE is_conversion DO NOTHING
                    RETURNING
                        id,
                        metric_id,
                        feature_key,
                        environment_id,
                        user_context,
                        variant,
                        value,
                        metadata,
                        is_conversion,
                        created_at,
                        occurred_at
